scripts.build: bash scripts/fetch-data.sh && node scripts/gen-font-families.mjs && node scripts/gen-ssg-routes.mjs && vite-ssg build
scripts.build:no-fetch: node scripts/gen-font-families.mjs && node scripts/gen-ssg-routes.mjs && vite-ssg build
scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs src/lib/markdown/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/unicode/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/fonts/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/*.test.ts scripts/__tests__/*.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: node --test --watch tests/*.test.mjs src/lib/markdown/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/unicode/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/fonts/__tests__/*.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/*.test.ts scripts/__tests__/*.test.ts
